name: Pargolfstudios
address: 17081 Cam Ct Unit 3/4, Fort Myers, FL 33967
about: Par Golf Studios is a professional indoor training facility offering lessons and practice opportunities for golfers of all skill levels. The facility is equipped with Trackman technology and is designed to provide a tailored training experience for individuals and groups. Membership plans are available for convenient, walk-in access to the indoor facility. A complimentary 30-minute facility tour is required as the first step to discuss training packages and memberships.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses premium Trackman technology for accurate data tracking
Offers a proprietary system that retains user data for their entire golf career
Provides personalized guidance from expert instructors
Features flexible membership plans to meet individual needs
Indoor facility allows for year-round training regardless of weather

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food services available
No information on alcohol services available

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary technology partnership for data tracking

faq.answer: There is no information on-site food or drink services, but the venue does not mention any restrictions on bringing outside food or beverages.

faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for 18 holes of virtual golf.
